rationale: No-regression lens on spec/114 @41d8e8af, all work in /tmp clone. gate.go: the 11 pre-existing legs (hatch/fail-open/malformed/abandoned/round-mismatch/missing-ref/transient-gitErr/stale-SHA/dirty/incomplete/REJECT-hard_block/threshold) are byte-preserved; leg 9.5 is inserted between (9) and (10) and AppliedRefutations is set ONLY on the leg-10 Allow — the Decision struct gains one slice field (now non-comparable, documented). tally.go VoteDecision gets the SAME 9.5 leg after REJECT/hard_block, before threshold; prior legs intact. panel_advisory.go: panelGate signature is byte-identical; the Block/Warn switch arms are byte-identical, the new Allow arm is purely additive (collects refutations); reconcile is additive step 3.75. bdcli.go MergeMetadata fail-closed + new GetMetadata is the declared R2 carry-forward hardening (genuine read only aborts on real failure; clean-absent still merges). panel.go adds a parse-lenient Refutations field. Production delegation code (cmd/mindspec/panel.go, internal/instruct/panelstate.go) is UNTOUCHED — only their test fixtures adjusted for the four intended R1 flips; every 5A+1RC 'at-threshold' fixture is flipped to Block or restated as clean 6/6 all-APPROVE, no unrelated fixture flips. Empirical in /tmp (go1.26): build OK, gofmt -l ./cmd ./internal empty, vet clean, and go test -race ./cmd/mindspec ./internal/instruct ./internal/complete ./internal/panel ./internal/bead all PASS (z4ps flake did not fire). No regression found.
